description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a gentle taper from the base to the neck, finished with a rounded shoulder and a cylindrical neck. The bottle is primarily a light greenish-blue color, giving it a slightly frosted or translucent appearance. A decorative, ornate label is affixed to the front, bordered with gold filigree and featuring stylized text in the center. The bottle is sealed with a beige or light tan cap, which appears to be a cork. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A tall, slender, light greenish-blue bottle with a gold-bordered ornate label and a beige cork cap. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a slightly translucent appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate gold-bordered label and the beige cork cap clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, showing the bottle's smooth, curved profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label visible, highlighting the uniform color and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the edge of the label just visible, emphasizing the bottle's cylindrical shape.
attribute_label_or_branding: Ornate gold-bordered label with stylized text in the center, placed on the front of the bottle.
